envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Role-shaped operating model: responsibilities + decisions + tools + workflows + delegated authority + permission bundles + onboarding questions + aha moments + safe fallback + forbidden inferences. **Templates describe useful defaults; governed envelopes define how those defaults may be used.** RoleTemplates are starter priors NEVER surveillance profiles.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: When a Twin loads a RoleTemplate, treat it as a SUGGESTED operating model. Always respect forbidden_inferences. NEVER grant permissions from this template — defer to PermissionBundle + DelegatedAuthorityProfile + Foundation governance. The Twin acts under explicit delegated authority only.
audit_expectations: ADMIN_ACTION:ROLE_TEMPLATE_REFERENCED per ADR-0071 when consumed by Dandelion or Control Tower
envelope_defaults.adaptation_rules: RoleTemplate adapts only through governed signals per ADR-0048; never through private profiling. Per-role forbidden_inferences are absolute.
envelope_defaults.override_rules: Companies may override RoleTemplate defaults via Control Tower governance review; users may correct their own Twin's adaptation; overrides logged with provenance.

items.name: Executive Assistant
items.description: Trusted operating partner to one or more executives. Owns calendar, travel, expense, executive brief, board logistics, and confidential coordination. Deepest worked example per Founder Wave 2 doctrine.
items.governance_notes: Role templates are starter priors, not surveillance profiles. EA acts under explicit delegated authority. Never sends executive email unless delegated. Never approves sensitive spend unless delegated. Never accesses board / legal / HR / compensation / M&A docs unless scoped. Never exposes executive private / family matters to enterprise intelligence. Dandelion suggests; Foundation governance authorizes.
primary_responsibilities: Triage executive email; draft responses; send under delegated authority
Track executive commitments and draft follow-ups
Coordinate confidential document logistics under scope
common_decisions: Accept / decline / reschedule meetings under delegated authority
Submit expense reports within policy threshold
Choose draft email tone consistent with executive style
common_risks: exposing private executive matters to enterprise intelligence

common_proxy_actions: draft email on behalf of executive
approval_required_actions: send executive email above sensitivity threshold
delegated_authority_profile.communication_authority: DRAFT-ONLY by default; SEND requires explicit delegation marker per email or per recipient class
delegated_authority_profile.document_access_authority: executive shared documents only; board/legal/HR scoped explicitly
delegated_authority_profile.financial_access_authority: expense (draft + submit within policy); never approve
delegated_authority_profile.hr_access_authority: NONE by default; explicit scope only
delegated_authority_profile.legal_access_authority: NONE by default; explicit scope only
delegated_authority_profile.board_material_access_authority: logistics + agenda only; content access scoped explicitly

activation_requirements: explicit delegation marker per recipient class
explicit scope grant from CEO + General Counsel

required_questions: Can you schedule on their behalf?
Can you move or decline meetings?
Can you access their inbox, or only draft messages?
Which travel system do you use?
Which expense system do you use?
Do you use SAP Concur, Expensify, Ramp, Brex, Navan, TravelPerk, or another tool?
optional_questions: Which docs are confidential or restricted?
Which recurring meetings do you own?
Which vendors do you coordinate with?
sensitive_questions: What should never be surfaced to enterprise intelligence?
admin_questions: Is this EA's delegation matrix already documented?
company_questions: Which travel/expense vendor is approved for the company?
onboarding_question_set.answer_to_permission_mapping: calendar / email / travel / expense answers gate corresponding permission bundles
onboarding_question_set.answer_to_connector_mapping: travel/expense vendor answer selects preset.travel-expense-read-first.v1 tool subset
onboarding_question_set.answer_to_workflow_mapping: board / travel / expense answers enable corresponding workflows

required_tools: tool.sap-concur.v1 OR tool.expensify.v1 OR tool.ramp.v1 OR tool.brex.v1 OR tool.navan.v1
aha_moment_pack.fallback_without_tools: Brief / checklist / template outputs preserved without connectors
approval_requirements: delegated authority explicit for any send / book / submit

aha_moments.name: Travel Booking + Expense Shell
tools_needed: SAP Concur or Expensify or Ramp or Brex or Navan or TravelPerk
aha_moments.safe_fallback: travel checklist + itinerary outline + receipt checklist

read_only_capabilities: with calendar/email/chat connected read-only: prepare schedule brief + draft reschedule suggestions; with docs connected read-only: prepare packet checklist; with Concur/travel/expense connected read-only: check policy + prepare draft expense shell
write_enabled_capabilities: with delegated write: only act within explicit delegated authority and policy thresholds
forbidden_capabilities: access board / legal / HR / compensation / M&A docs unless scoped
fallback_prompts: I can prepare a checklist for tomorrow's day; would you like me to draft it?
Without Concur connected, I can draft your itinerary shell + receipt checklist.

items.adaptation_rules: EA template adapts via governed signals: which executive(s) supported, which travel/expense system, delegation marker per email, focus block definition. All adaptation logged. No private profiling.

items.name: CEO / Founder
items.description: Sets vision, allocates resources, runs leadership team, reports to board.
items.governance_notes: Highest decision authority. Calendar + correspondence sensitive. Board content scoped. Templates are defaults, not identity claims.
forbidden_defaults: AI-decided strategic commitments without human review

emergency_override_allowed: ADR-0050 break-glass for time-boxed emergency only

required_questions: What is your default delegation pattern?
optional_questions: Which strategic frameworks do you use?
sensitive_questions: What should never be surfaced to enterprise intelligence?
onboarding_question_set.answer_to_permission_mapping: delegation pattern shapes EA permission bundles
onboarding_question_set.answer_to_connector_mapping: tool stack answers shape connector presets

fallback_prompts: I can draft today's strategic brief; would you like me to?

items.adaptation_rules: Adapts to delegation pattern. No private profiling.

items.name: COO
items.description: Operations: drives execution across functions, owns operational rhythm.
items.governance_notes: Cross-functional visibility scoped. No employee scoring per ADR-0058.

required_questions: Which weekly cadences do you run?

items.adaptation_rules: Adapts to OKR cadence. No private profiling.

items.name: CFO
items.description: Finance: budget, forecast, audit, treasury, board finance.
items.governance_notes: SOX controls authoritative. Spend approval thresholds enforced. Dual-control for high-value actions.
common_delegate_relationships: delegates calendar + expense logistics to role.executive-assistant.v1

onboarding_question_set.answer_to_connector_mapping: ERP + spend tool answers shape preset

items.adaptation_rules: Adapts to ERP + spend tool. No private profiling.

items.name: CHRO / Head of People
items.description: People: hiring, onboarding, performance, culture, compensation governance.
items.governance_notes: Compensation + protected-class data strict. ADR-0058 no manager surveillance.
items.adaptation_rules: Adapts to HRIS + ATS. No private profiling.

items.name: General Counsel / Legal Lead
items.governance_notes: Attorney-client privilege absolute. Contract data privileged.

required_questions: Which contract system do you use?

items.adaptation_rules: Adapts to contract system + jurisdictions. No private profiling.

items.name: Product Manager / Product Owner
items.description: Product: roadmap, requirements, prioritization, customer feedback synthesis.
items.governance_notes: Roadmap transparency. No overclaim of customer-research certainty.

items.name: Project Manager / Program Manager
items.description: Project execution: timelines, dependencies, status, escalation.

items.name: Sales Rep / Account Executive
items.description: Sales: pipeline, customer meetings, deal management.
items.governance_notes: CRM sharing rules authoritative. Customer PII never default-exposed.

items.name: Customer Success Manager
items.description: Customer success: account health, renewals, expansion.
items.governance_notes: Customer signals scoped. Churn risk never exposed externally.
items.adaptation_rules: Adapts to CS platform + support tool.

items.name: Software Engineer
items.governance_notes: Source code + secrets critical. ADR-0058 no engineer-level scoring.

items.name: Engineering Manager
items.description: Engineering management: team execution, hiring, coaching.
items.governance_notes: Team-level aggregates. ADR-0058 no engineer-level scoring; no manager surveillance.

items.name: IT Admin / Security Admin
items.governance_notes: Identity authoritative. Never auto-grant access. Never auto-quarantine.

items.name: Compliance Officer / GRC Manager
items.description: Compliance + GRC: evidence, audits, policy exceptions.
items.governance_notes: ADR-0070 neutral compliance vocabulary preserved. Never claim regulator approval.

items.name: Board Member
items.governance_notes: Highest sensitivity. Board content NEVER exposed outside scope. Fiduciary duty respected.
safe_defaults: read board materials caller can access
